replies.msg:
Pros

+
quieter than most gaming laptops when gaming
+
2x storage bays, 2x SODIMM slots
+
lightweight for a 17.3-inch laptop
+
full-size Arrow keys
+
integrated NumPad
+
narrow bezels



Cons

-
no per-key RGB lighting, Thunderbolt 3, or SD reader
-
below average CPU performance; weak Turbo Boost
-
fans never idle even when browsing or streaming
-
servicing requires breaking a 'factory seal' sticker
-
no 120/144 Hz or fast display response times
-
flexible chassis and lid; mostly thin plastic
-
strange Kensington Lock positioning
-
pricey for a budget gaming laptop
